meaning: adj.无复制品的,无副本的无法匹敌的,无法模拟的
examples: How to generate 4 unduplicated Numbers from certain range?
The size of the unduplicated audience that listens exclusively to one station within some specified period.
In Castle Hotel, you can appreciate unduplicated ecology landscape and feel unsurpassable elite experience.
The unduplicated headcount of varsity athletics participants divided by the total undergraduate population, multiplied by 100.
